data.name: AccrualHelpText
data.value: Adds points to the customer account for this visit.

data.name: HomeLoadingMessage
data.value: Loading your business context and operator access...

data.name: LoginEmailConfirmationRequired
data.value: Please confirm your email address before signing in.

data.name: LoginAccountLocked
data.value: Your account is currently locked. Please contact support.

data.name: ActivationEmailSent
data.value: Confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: ActivationEmailRequestFailed
data.value: Unable to send a confirmation email right now. Please try again.

data.name: LoginReadinessBusy
data.value: Signing you in and restoring your business access...

data.name: LoginReadinessEmail
data.value: Enter your business email to continue.

data.name: LoginReadinessReady
data.value: Your operator credentials are ready. You can continue now.

data.name: NoQrDetected
data.value: No QR code detected. Please try again.

data.name: PointsMustBeGreaterThanZero
data.value: Points must be greater than zero.

data.name: RedemptionHelpText
data.value: Confirms reward redemption and deducts required points.

data.name: RedemptionNotAllowed
data.value: Redemption is not allowed for this session.

data.name: AccrualNotAllowed
data.value: Accrual is not allowed for this session.

data.name: ServerUnreachableMessage
data.value: Unable to reach server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

data.name: NoBusinessMembershipMessage
data.value: Your username and password are correct, but your account is not assigned to any business yet. Please contact support.

data.name: SubscriptionDescription
data.value: View your current subscription here. Plan changes, billing actions, and payment management are handled on the Loyan website.

data.name: SubscriptionNoActivePlan
data.value: No active subscription found for this business.

data.name: SubscriptionReadOnlyNotice
data.value: To change plans, manage payment methods, or update billing details, use the Loyan website.

data.name: SubscriptionReadOnlyCancellationNotice
data.value: Cancellation is already scheduled for period end. Any further subscription changes must be completed on the Loyan website.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteHint
data.value: Open the Loyan website to manage subscription type, billing details, invoices, and payment actions outside the mobile app.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteMissingHint
data.value: The Loyan management website is not configured yet. Please contact your admin team.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteMissingUrl
data.value: The Loyan management website URL is not configured.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteInvalidUrl
data.value: The Loyan management website URL is invalid. Configure an absolute URL.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteRequiresHttps
data.value: The Loyan management website URL must use HTTPS.

data.name: SubscriptionManagementWebsiteOpenFailed
data.value: Unable to open the Loyan website right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: SubscriptionCancelAtPeriodEndScheduled
data.value: Cancellation was scheduled for the end of current period.

data.name: SubscriptionCancelAtPeriodEndUpdateFailed
data.value: Unable to update cancellation preference. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: SubscriptionPlansUnavailable
data.value: No billing plans are currently available.

data.name: SubscriptionNoAlternativePlans
data.value: No alternative plans are currently available for upgrade.

data.name: SubscriptionCheckoutNoPlanSelected
data.value: Select a plan to continue checkout.

data.name: SubscriptionCheckoutUrlInvalid
data.value: Checkout URL is invalid. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: SubscriptionCheckoutStartFailed
data.value: Unable to start checkout right now. Please try again.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalReadyHint
data.value: Billing portal is configured for this environment. Open it to manage plan and payment details.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalMissingHint
data.value: Billing portal is not configured for this environment yet. Contact your admin team.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalCopiedHint
data.value: Billing portal URL copied to clipboard.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalOpenFailed
data.value: Unable to open billing portal right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalCopyFailed
data.value: Unable to copy billing portal URL right now. Please try again.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalValidationMissingUrl
data.value: Billing portal URL is not configured.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalValidationInvalidUrl
data.value: Billing portal URL is invalid. Configure an absolute URL.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalValidationRequiresHttps
data.value: Billing portal URL must use HTTPS.

data.name: SubscriptionPortalValidationHostNotAllowedFormat
data.value: Billing portal host "{0}" is not allowed for this environment.

data.name: StaffAccessBadgeDescription
data.value: Use this short-lived QR for internal staff checkpoints and controlled business operations.

data.name: StaffAccessBadgeLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to prepare staff badge right now.

data.name: ProfileRequiredFields
data.value: Please fill all required profile fields before saving.

data.name: ProfileNotLoadedYet
data.value: Profile is not loaded yet. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: ProfileConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Your profile was updated elsewhere. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: PasswordMismatch
data.value: New password and confirmation do not match.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: New password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: PasswordChangeFailed
data.value: Unable to change password. Please check your current password.

data.name: RewardsSubtitle
data.value: Create and maintain reward tiers for your loyalty program.

data.name: RewardsDeleteSelectionRequiredHint
data.value: Select an existing reward tier below before deleting it.

data.name: RewardsTiersEmptyStateMessage
data.value: No reward tiers have been configured yet. Create the first tier above to define your loyalty offer.

data.name: RewardsEditorNewHint
data.value: Create a new reward tier here, or select an existing tier below to revise it.

data.name: RewardsEditorEditingHint
data.value: You are editing an existing reward tier. Save to apply updates, or delete it if the offer is no longer valid.

data.name: RewardsValidationFailed
data.value: Please review reward tier fields and try again.

data.name: RewardsPointsValidation
data.value: Points required must be a number greater than zero.

data.name: RewardsTypeValidation
data.value: Please select a valid reward type.

data.name: RewardsValueValidation
data.value: Reward value must be a valid number.

data.name: DashboardLoadingMessage
data.value: Preparing business KPIs and recent activity...

data.name: DashboardSubtitle
data.value: Operational snapshot for recent scanner activity.

data.name: DashboardTopCustomersEmpty
data.value: No customer interactions were recorded in the selected window.

data.name: DashboardRecentActivityEmpty
data.value: No recent activity was recorded yet.

data.name: BusinessPermissionDeniedRewardEdit
data.value: Your account does not have permission to edit reward tiers.

data.name: BusinessPermissionDeniedRedemption
data.value: Your account does not have permission to confirm redemption.

data.name: BusinessPermissionDeniedAccrual
data.value: Your account does not have permission to confirm accrual.

data.name: BusinessPermissionsUnavailableWarning
data.value: Operator permissions could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: BusinessNoScannerPermissionWarning
data.value: Your account does not currently have scanner processing permissions.

data.name: ScannerSingleOwnerHint
data.value: After scanning, the session screen will load details and handle confirmation in one place.

data.name: ScannerReadinessBusy
data.value: Preparing scanner access and processing the current scan...

data.name: ScannerReadinessReady
data.value: Scanner access is ready. Start a scan when the customer QR is available.

data.name: RewardsCampaignToggleFailed
data.value: Unable to change campaign activation state.

data.name: RewardsCampaignValidationFailed
data.value: Campaign name and title are required.

data.name: RewardsCampaignNameDuplicateValidationFailed
data.value: A campaign with this internal name already exists.

data.name: RewardsCampaignDateValidationFailed
data.value: Campaign date format is invalid. Use yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm.

data.name: RewardsCampaignDateRangeValidationFailed
data.value: Campaign start date must be earlier than end date.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingHintTierSegment
data.value: Tier preset: provide tier value, for example {"audienceKind":"TierSegment","tier":"Gold"}.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingHintPointsThreshold
data.value: Points preset: provide minimumPoints, for example {"audienceKind":"PointsThreshold","minimumPoints":100}.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingHintDateWindow
data.value: Date-window preset: provide eligibleFromUtc and eligibleToUtc in ISO-8601 UTC format.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingHintInvalid
data.value: Targeting JSON is invalid. Use presets or a valid JSON object.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingSchemaTierMissing
data.value: Tier audience requires a non-empty "tier" value.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingSchemaMinimumPointsMissing
data.value: Points audience requires a non-negative "minimumPoints" value.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingSchemaDateWindowMissing
data.value: Date-window audience requires valid "eligibleFromUtc" and "eligibleToUtc" UTC values.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingSchemaDateWindowRangeInvalid
data.value: Date-window audience requires eligibleFromUtc to be earlier than or equal to eligibleToUtc.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingFixAppliedMessage
data.value: Quick fix applied to targeting JSON.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingFixNoChangesMessage
data.value: No schema fix was needed for targeting JSON.

data.name: RewardsCampaignTargetingValidationFailed
data.value: Targeting JSON must be a valid JSON object.

data.name: RewardsCampaignPayloadValidationFailed
data.value: Payload JSON must be a valid JSON object.

data.name: RewardsCampaignChannelValidationFailed
data.value: Please select a valid campaign delivery channel.

data.name: RewardsCampaignSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search campaigns by name, title, or body

data.name: RewardsCampaignsEmptyFiltered
data.value: No campaigns match the current search/filter.

data.name: RewardsCampaignsEmptyDataset
data.value: No campaigns have been created yet. Use the campaign editor above to prepare your first campaign draft.

data.name: RewardsCampaignEditorNewHint
data.value: Create a new campaign draft here, or select an existing campaign below to revise targeting and schedule.

data.name: RewardsCampaignEditorEditingHint
data.value: You are editing an existing campaign. Save to keep changes aligned with the current activation and targeting rules.

data.name: RewardsCampaignSelectionHint
data.value: Select an existing campaign below if you want to revise it instead of creating a new draft.

data.name: RewardsCampaignDiagnosticsAppliedFiltersFormat
data.value: Applied filters — State: {0} · Audience: {1} · Search: {2} · Sort: {3}

data.name: RewardsCampaignDiagnosticsCopyFailed
data.value: Unable to copy campaign diagnostics right now.

data.name: AuthLegalSectionSubtitle
data.value: Review the legal pages before signing in to the business app.

data.name: LegalHubSubtitle
data.value: Open the current legal and privacy pages maintained on loyan.de.

data.name: LegalOpenFailed
data.value: The legal page could not be opened right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: AccountDeletionWarningBody
data.value: Business-account deletion is completed on the external Loyan website. Review the information carefully before continuing.

data.name: AccountDeletionExternalHint
data.value: The app will open https://loyan.de/konto-loeschen in the in-app browser when possible.

data.name: AccountDeletionOpenFailed
data.value: The account deletion page could not be opened right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: CameraDisclosurePurpose
data.value: Loyan Business uses the camera to scan loyalty QR codes and load the correct scan session for processing.

data.name: CameraDisclosureRequirement
data.value: Camera access is functionally required for on-device scanning, but manual token entry remains available when permission is not granted.

data.name: CameraDisclosureDeniedBody
data.value: Camera access has been denied. You can enable it in app settings or continue with manual token entry.

data.name: ScannerManualTokenMessage
data.value: Camera unavailable. Paste the ScanSessionToken or cancel.

data.name: InvitationAcceptFailed
data.value: Unable to accept the invitation right now.

data.name: InvitationExistingUserHint
data.value: This email already belongs to an existing account. Accepting the invitation will sign you into the Business app.

data.name: InvitationNewUserHint
data.value: Complete your profile and set a password to create the invited business account.

data.name: InvitationPasswordMismatch
data.value: Password and confirmation do not match.

data.name: InvitationNotFoundMessage
data.value: Invitation was not found. Please check the token or request a new invitation.

data.name: InvitationExpiredMessage
data.value: Invitation has expired. Please request a new invitation.

data.name: InvitationRevokedMessage
data.value: Invitation has been revoked. Please contact your administrator.

data.name: InvitationAlreadyAcceptedMessage
data.value: Invitation was already accepted. Sign in with your account.

data.name: InvitationAccountUnavailableMessage
data.value: The invited account is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

data.name: DashboardPdfNoCustomerInteractions
data.value: - No customer interactions in the selected window.

data.name: DashboardActivityKindCampaignTargetingFixNoChange
data.value: Campaign targeting quick fix not needed

data.name: HomeTestingHintBody
data.value: Before scanning a QR code, ensure the Consumer account joined this same business.

data.name: HomeResolveCurrentBusinessContextFailed
data.value: Unable to resolve the current business context.

data.name: HomeLoadBusinessInfoFailed
data.value: Unable to load business information right now. Please try again.
